Form Snapshot — Test Page

Four forms below cover the common field types. Open the extension popup, save a snapshot on each, then reload this page and Apply the snapshot. Watch the live readouts under each input to confirm synthetic input/change events fire (these prove React-style controlled components would re-render).

1. Login (id="login-form")

2. Profile (name="profile")

3. Anonymous form (no id, no name)

4. Controlled-component style (name="controlled")

State says: (empty)

State says: false
